001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
005import androidx.room.Entity;
006import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009import java.time.LocalDate;
010
011
012@Entity(
013    tableName = "batch",
014    foreignKeys = {
015        @ForeignKey(
016            entity = Incubator.class,
017            parentColumns = "incubator_id",
018            childColumns = "incubator_id",
019            onDelete = ForeignKey.SET_NULL
020        )
021    },
022    indices = {
023        @Index(value = {"incubator_id"})
024    }
025)
026
027public class Batch {
028
029  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
030  @ColumnInfo(name = "batch_id")
031  private long id;
032
033  // TODO: 3/30/2026 Set this field to @NotNull in the future when the UI is set up to require
034  //  incubator selection. The ERD reflects this intent currently.
035  @ColumnInfo(name = "incubator_id")
036  private Long incubatorId;
037
038  @ColumnInfo(name = "batch_number")
039  private Integer batchNumber;
040
041  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
042  @ColumnInfo(name = "date_set")
043  @NonNull
044  private LocalDate dateSet;
045
046  @ColumnInfo(name = "lockdown_date")
047  private LocalDate lockdownDate;
048
049  @ColumnInfo(name = "expected_hatch_date")
050  private LocalDate expectedHatchDate;
051
052  @ColumnInfo(name = "num_eggs_set")
053  private int numEggsSet;
054
055  private String notes;
056
057  @ColumnInfo(name = "batch_status")
058  private String batchStatus;  // future enum candidate, same pattern as hatchStatus on Egg
059
060
061  public long getId() {
062    return id;
063  }
064
065  public void setId(long id) {
066    this.id = id;
067  }
068
069  public Long getIncubatorId() {
070    return incubatorId;
071  }
072
073  public void setIncubatorId(Long incubatorId) {
074    this.incubatorId = incubatorId;
075  }
076
077  public Integer getBatchNumber() {
078    return batchNumber;
079  }
080
081  public void setBatchNumber(Integer batchNumber) {
082    this.batchNumber = batchNumber;
083  }
084
085  @NonNull
086  public LocalDate getDateSet() {
087    return dateSet;
088  }
089
090  public void setDateSet(@NonNull LocalDate dateSet) {
091    this.dateSet = dateSet;
092  }
093
094  public LocalDate getLockdownDate() {
095    return lockdownDate;
096  }
097
098  public void setLockdownDate(LocalDate lockdownDate) {
099    this.lockdownDate = lockdownDate;
100  }
101
102  public LocalDate getExpectedHatchDate() {
103    return expectedHatchDate;
104  }
105
106  public void setExpectedHatchDate(LocalDate expectedHatchDate) {
107    this.expectedHatchDate = expectedHatchDate;
108  }
109
110  public int getNumEggsSet() {
111    return numEggsSet;
112  }
113
114  public void setNumEggsSet(int numEggsSet) {
115    this.numEggsSet = numEggsSet;
116  }
117
118  public String getNotes() {
119    return notes;
120  }
121
122  public void setNotes(String notes) {
123    this.notes = notes;
124  }
125
126  public String getBatchStatus() {
127    return batchStatus;
128  }
129
130  public void setBatchStatus(String batchStatus) {
131    this.batchStatus = batchStatus;
132  }
133}
134
135
